objective: Fix CSS loading issues and ensure all portfolio pages have consistent dark theme styling matching the landing page

stories.title: Debug CSS Loading Issues
stories.description: Investigate and fix why CSS styles are not loading properly on the FBA Dashboard page. The page shows unstyled content instead of the dark theme.
acceptance_criteria: FBA Dashboard page loads with dark background (#131921)
All KPI cards display with proper styling
Tables and charts have dark theme applied

stories.title: Verify All Portfolio Pages
stories.description: Ensure all 4 portfolio pages (landing, sp-api-automation, restock-calculator, fba-dashboard) load correctly with consistent styling
acceptance_criteria: Landing page: Dark theme with animated cards
SP-API Automation: Centered layout with feature orbit
Restock Calculator: Two-column layout with cards
FBA Dashboard: KPI grid with charts and tables

stories.title: Match Landing Page Design
stories.description: Ensure all sub-pages match the landing page color scheme and have consistent visual elements
acceptance_criteria: Same color variables across all pages (#131921, #00a8e8)
Ambient blue gradient background on all pages
Card hover effects with lift and glow
